id: refresh-jwt-token
title: "Refresh JWT token"
description: "Issues a new JWT token from the current valid token and sets it as a cookie"

  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/user/refresh"}
  context={"endpoint"}

Issues a new JWT token from the current valid token and sets it as a cookie
